title: Companies
content:
Companies are a type of business structure that are separate from the people who own it.  Companies can either make a profit or loss at the end of each income year and use losses to reduce income tax in the following years.
To form a company, you will need to register it by:
- contacting the Companies Office
- paying for a legal registration process.
Companies need to send tax returns to us and annual returns to the Companies Office.
